warm_up:
Activation & Mobilisation Drills:
1 round
30sec e/s PVC Shoulder Opener
5 PVC Around the Worlds each way
5 PVC Pass Throughs
10 Band Row Rotate Press
10 Cossack Squats
5 Tempo Banded Squats
15 Empty Bar Squats

strength.name: Behind The Neck Jerk
strength.description:
1x3 | *Knees out, Keep upright
*Pause in catch
*Bring front foot back first | E2MOM 10min
Work Up to a Top Set of 5. Increase weight if it is feeling good or dial it in for another set.
00:00 5
02:00 5
04:00 5
06:00 5
08:00 5

hypertrophy.reasoning: Squats and jerks heavily tax legs and shoulders; accessory work targets posterior chain and arm hypertrophy without CNS fatigue.

siri_text: Tuesday's workout. Strength: Back Squat, 5 by 5 at 75 percent. Strength: Behind The Neck Jerk, 1 by 3. For hypertrophy, focus on back, arms, core stability.
